title: PeriodicRestart
description: Periodic restart configuration for the application pool.

time_interval.description: The time interval in minutes after which the application pool recycles.

private_memory.description: The private memory threshold in kilobytes that triggers recycling. 0 means disabled.

request_limit.description: The number of requests after which the application pool recycles. 0 means disabled.

virtual_memory.description: The virtual memory threshold in kilobytes that triggers recycling. 0 means disabled.

schedule.description: Scheduled times for recycling the application pool.
